title: Arrabidaea inaequalis
taxonomy: Arrabidaea inaequalis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. This family is commonly known as the trumpet vine or catalpa family. Members of the Bignoniaceae family are often found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Bignoniaceae family is a part of the order Lamiales, which includes a diverse group of flowering plants. The classification of Arrabidaea inaequalis reflects its unique characteristics and relationships to other plants within the Bignoniaceae family.
